original_image_tags: A single, aged manila folder or file cover. The top edge is scalloped, and there are two hole-punches near the top. In the center, handwritten in blue ink, is "62-82894-244" (with "244" in red ink). Below that is typed in black ink: "CHANGED TO". Below that, handwritten in blue ink: "62-48563-" (with "7X" in red ink). In the bottom-left corner, stamped in black ink: "NOV 13 1951". Below the stamp, handwritten in green ink: "mmb" and below that a small cursive initial that appears to be a "c".

elements.description: Page contains two hole-punch marks at the top, a stamped date 'NOV 13 1951', and handwritten annotations including '62-83894-244', 'CHANGED TO', '62-48563-7X', and unintelligible initials below the date. No photographic or graphical content.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements: a folder cover with scalloped top edge, two hole-punches, a stamped date 'NOV 13 1951', and handwritten annotations including '62-83894-244', 'CHANGED TO', and '62-48563-7X', with no photographic content present.
